task: Create an IAM policy that allows read-only access to S3 buckets with names starting with 'backup-'
Write a function that extracts the bucket name from an S3 ARN (e.g., 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket/folder/file.txt')
Create a regex pattern to validate AWS region names (e.g., 'us-east-1', 'eu-west-2', 'ap-southeast-1')
